title: thalictrum minus subsp. macrophyllum
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. macrophyllum, also known as the meadow rue, is a perennial plant belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) characterized by its fern-like foliage and delicate, nodding flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of meadow rue include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy. Meadow rue can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
